title: A safer, warmer web home for Les Bi Gulf Friends
intro: This starter keeps things simple: a mobile-first Next.js site on Vercel, Supabase for auth and app data, and Tina CMS + GitHub for editable content.

cards.title: Friends first
cards.body: Keep messaging gated behind friendship so there are no cold DMs.

cards.title: Groups and community
cards.body: Use groups for interest-based conversation without swipe pressure.

cards.title: Events later
cards.body: Start with content, auth, and community pages. Add events/check-ins in phase two.
